brand.name: Cape Ember Coffee Co.
brand.tagline: Experience South Africa in Every Cup

rules: Overlines/labels must be Uppercase + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Do not use generic sans for headings.
Max hero heading size is text-6xl.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-12, p-16, p-24 for sections. Components with borders need p-6.
layout.grid_strategy: Tetris grid for marketing sections. Bento-style layouts for product highlights. Avoid perfectly symmetrical basic grids. Use col-span-full for featured items.
layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm. Keep it sharp and premium.
layout.shadows: Minimal. Use 1px borders instead of heavy shadows. On hover, use shadow-md or shadow-lg with a warm tint.

components.buttons: Flat solid background, sharp edges (rounded-none), tracking-wide. Never rely on default Vercel-look. Primary buttons in Terracotta (#A94826).
components.cards: Cardless or flat surface (#F2EEE8) with 1px subtle border (#E5DCD0). No massive shadows.
components.inputs: Flat, bottom border only (border-b-2) or subtle full border. Solid background #FAFAF7. Focus ring in Terracotta.
components.navigation: Solid background (#FAFAF7) or Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAFAF7]/80). Must have visible navigation links.
components.data_test_attributes: MUST include data-testid attribute on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs).

animations.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle warm shadow. Images scale up slightly inside overflow-hidden containers.
animations.page_transitions: Smooth fade in, stagger entrance for product grids.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets 4.5:1 ratio over backgrounds. Use text shadow over images.
accessibility.focus: Focus states must have high contrast outline.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic Shadcn styling. Override all colors and border radii to match the Organic & Earthy theme.
All text over hero images must be clearly readable. Use gradient overlays (e.g. from-black/70 to-transparent) if needed.
Implement a bento grid or asymmetrical layout for marketing sections.
Always use the provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholders.
Ensure the shopping cart, checkout (PayFast), and user dashboards look seamless and use the same flat, sharp design language.
All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
